# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing every
runtime registration aggregated across plugins, one row per registration with
its formatted name, kind, runtime, and owning plugin columns. Reads
`node.facets["registrations"]` for every plugin.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin registrations table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Registrations"
